rationale: The pair shares a central construct (usage estimation): the cited paper develops a cognitive model of usage self-prediction errors, and the citing paper’s stated contribution explicitly extends prior work on usage overestimation by proposing failure-to-estimate as an additional mechanism. Given this direct conceptual continuity in the notes (rather than a purely peripheral topic match), this citation is plausibly foundational/theory-relevant and should be reviewed in second-stage judgment.
